__doc__: Route-keyed axe rule allowlist for the ui-ux-design-loop G4 gate. Burn down to empty: fix violations first; only allowlist triaged items with tracking context. Strict mode honors this list and fails on any UN-triaged violation. NEVER allowlist structural rules (roles/names/aria) — only deliberate design-system palette rules. BURNED DOWN 2026-07-02: every color-contrast entry was resolved by darkening --p-muted #807A6F -> #6B665B in the portal (brand authority, ADR-003) — >=4.5:1 on all brand surfaces. The G4 gates now enforce true zero on every surface.
